---
name: Feature
about: New capability or improvement
title: "feat: "
labels: ["type/feature"]
---

## The ask

What should exist that does not yet.

## Why

The problem it solves. If you cannot explain the why, it may not be worth doing.

## Scope

What is in, and explicitly what is out, so this does not quietly grow into three
features.

## Definition of done

The observable outcome, plus tests and docs.
